name: architecture-analysis
description: Architecture analysis: evaluate coupling, cohesion, and dependency direction before structural changes.
steps: Draw the dependency graph of modules involved
Check dependency direction — do dependencies flow from unstable to stable?
Identify coupling points — where does changing one module force changes in another?
Evaluate cohesion — does each module have a single clear responsibility?
Propose the change with minimal new coupling
Verify the change doesn't create circular dependencies
